error_signature: mouse pointer disappearing on overflowing element
title: Mouse pointer disappears when hovering over dropdown in datagrid
symptom: The mouse pointer disappears when it moves outside the datagrid, affecting interaction with dropdowns.
applies_when: Mouse moves outside the datagrid area
not_this_if: Mouse pointer behaves normally within the datagrid
root_cause: The issue arises due to the stacking context of the elements involved. If the z-index of the datagrid is lower than that of other overlapping elements, it can cause the mouse pointer to not register correctly when hovering over dropdowns.
fix_steps: Select the datagrid element in your CSS or styling panel
Increase the z-index value of the datagrid to be higher than the elements below it
agent_instruction: Increase the z-index of the datagrid to ensure it is above other elements.
